author: Harry
description:
Peacetime focused mod for engaging and diverse empire management experience. Companion mods: Dynamic Units, Battlegear, Morale

Overhaul the peacetime/economic aspects of the game, with a focus on enabling multiple divergent strategies and adapting to environment. Encourage more thoughtful city placement and empire management/expansion. 

Some features include:

New additions: traits, effects, events, projects, cognomens, ambitions, missions, laws etc. 
Reworked families and nations
new improvements with unique graphics (thanks And!) and interesting new effects
Wonders buffed and more available each game
New and rebalanced improvements, classes, cognomen and much more
Completely reworked economy, focus on improvement geometry and discontent management
English and German localization supported (Thanks Groo!)
Fun and impactful improvement placement strategies 
Resources are more powerful, diverse, and fun to harvest!
Differentiated architypes and families and nations each offer completely different playing styles
New Cognomens, and all Cognomens offer greater diversity and satisfaction! 

As a XML-only mod, all features are enabled thanks to relentless suppoort from the game developers, with folks like Solver implementing many features to meet my mods' needs specifically. 
Thanks for playing my mod, you can find me on the Old World Discord as Harry! .
